x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. Federates Queens Public Library's open branch directory (NYC Open Data) with the vendor-locked catalog (BiblioCommons), events (Communico), and digital collections (OverDrive/Libby, Axis 360, hoopla), and adds place_hold and apply_for_library_card — the net-new write workflows locked today inside the BiblioCommons account.

server.name: io.nyc.queenslibrary
server.title: Queens Public Library (QPL)
server.description: Agent-native access to Queens Public Library — branch locations from NYC Open Data, plus the catalog, events, and digital collections that live in QPL's vendor platforms (BiblioCommons, Communico, OverDrive/Libby, Axis 360, hoopla), and the net-new ability to place a hold on a title or apply for a library card — transactions that today live only behind a BiblioCommons login.
server.instructions: Use find_branches / get_branch to locate QPL branches by borough, council district, or ZIP (the one open, machine-readable dataset). search_catalog / get_catalog_item search the BiblioCommons bibliographic catalog. find_events covers programs from Communico (story times, computer classes, author talks). find_digital_collections searches eBooks/eAudiobooks/streaming across OverDrive/Libby, Axis 360, and hoopla. list_my_holds returns the authenticated patron's own holds. place_hold (net-new) reserves a catalog item for pickup at a chosen branch; apply_for_library_card (net-new) submits a card application. The two write tools require an authenticated patron and mutate state — confirm the item/branch (for a hold) or the applicant details (for a card) with the user before submitting. Note: QPL is one of three SEPARATE NYC library systems (with Brooklyn Public Library and The New York Public Library); a card, catalog, and holds here do not carry over to the others.

tools.name: find_branches
tools.title: Find Branches
tools.description: Search Queens Public Library branches by borough, council district, ZIP, and/or free text. The one open, machine-readable QPL dataset.

tools.name: get_branch
tools.title: Get Branch
tools.description: Fetch a QPL branch (address, phone, hours, geography) by id.

tools.name: search_catalog
tools.title: Search Catalog
tools.description: Search the QPL bibliographic catalog (books, audiobooks, DVDs) by keyword, author, format, or ISBN. Today reachable only through the BiblioCommons discovery layer.

tools.name: get_catalog_item
tools.title: Get Catalog Item
tools.description: Fetch a single catalog item (title, author, format, availability, holds) by BiblioCommons id.

tools.name: find_events
tools.title: Find Events
tools.description: Search QPL events and programs (story times, computer classes, author talks, ESOL) by branch, program type, audience, or date range. Managed in Communico.

tools.name: find_digital_collections
tools.title: Find Digital Collections
tools.description: Search digital-lending titles (eBooks, eAudiobooks, eMagazines, streaming) across OverDrive/Libby, Axis 360, and hoopla — federated into one model — by platform, format, author, or keyword.

tools.name: list_my_holds
tools.title: List My Holds
tools.description: List the authenticated patron's own holds and their status/queue position — today visible only inside the BiblioCommons account.

tools.name: place_hold
tools.title: Place a Hold
tools.description: Place a hold/reservation on a QPL catalog item for pickup at a chosen branch (book hold). NET-NEW workflow with no owned public API today — it lives only inside the BiblioCommons account. Requires an authenticated patron with a valid library card. Mutates state — confirm the item and pickup branch first.

tools.name: apply_for_library_card
tools.title: Apply for a Library Card
tools.description: Submit a QPL library card application (Full or the world-available $50/year Digital card). NET-NEW workflow with no owned public API today — it lives behind a login-walled form. Mutates state — confirm the applicant details before submitting.

x-agent-skills.note: Each tool maps to one of the ten NYC common government-process Agent Skills via x-agent-skill.

prompts.name: explore_queenslibrary
prompts.description: Search and read Queens Public Library (QPL) records — Branches, Catalog, Events, Digital.

prompts.name: schedule_queenslibrary
prompts.description: BookHold — place a hold/reservation on a catalog item (also: library-card application)

prompts.name: apply_for_queenslibrary
prompts.description: BookHold — place a hold/reservation on a catalog item (also: library-card application)
